commands.review_summary:
The PR validates Deepgram, z.ai, and MiMo endpoint override environment variables with the shared HTTPS/bare-host validator and adds Linux regression tests for credential-bearing requests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: set an HTTP override such as DEEPGRAM_API_URL or MIMO_API_URL on current main and the provider builds a token or cookie-bearing request to that URL. I did not execute live provider probes because the review is read-only and AGENTS.md cautions against credentialed live validation unless explicitly requested.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the upgrade behavior for existing HTTP endpoint override users, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: Harden provider endpoint overrides
target.body:
## Summary
- validate Deepgram, z.ai, and MiMo endpoint overrides with the shared HTTPS/bare-host validator before attaching provider credentials
- reject insecure or malformed override URLs for `DEEPGRAM_API_URL`, `Z_AI_QUOTA_URL`, `Z_AI_API_HOST`, and `MIMO_API_URL`
- add Linux regression tests that verify invalid overrides fail before a token or cookie-bearing request is sent

## Validation
- Docker pre-fix reproduction: built `CodexBarCLI` in `swift:6.2-noble` and confirmed local listener received Deepgram `Authorization: Token ...` and z.ai `Authorization: Bearer ...` headers when HTTP overrides were configured
- Docker post-fix reproduction: reran the same listener/CLI flow and confirmed the listeners received no requests; CLI returned endpoint override validation errors instead
- `docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work swift:6.2-noble bash -lc 'apt-get update >/dev/null && apt-get install -y libsqlite3-dev >/dev/null && swift test'`\n- `swift build --product CodexBarCLI`\n- `make check` reached SwiftFormat cleanly (`0/1169 files require formatting`) but local SwiftLint was blocked by `SourceKittenFramework/library_wrapper.swift:58: Fatal error: Loading sourcekitdInProc.framework/Versions/A/sourcekitdInProc failed`
target.author: hinotoi-agent

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
